rationale: Review 2 would lead to the better PR for reuse because it correctly identifies that broadly useful helpers such as `BialgHom.map_antipode`, `Bialgebra.TensorProduct.map_id`, and `map_comp` are hidden as `private`, while several base-change lemmas are thin specializations of existing tensor-product API. I could confirm the private-helper issue and the specialization pattern from the diff, though some suggested deletions of named base-change API may be a bit aggressive.
